problems.diagnostic: /CaseProject/modified_model.aadl | line 18: left and right sides of binary expression '<' are of type 'real' and 'int', but must be of the same type
problems.cause: max_accel is declared as real but used in comparison with int-typed expressions due to implicit integer literals in conditionals
problems.minimal_edit: change 'max_accel : real = 40.0' to 'max_accel : real = 40.0' (already correct) but rewrite the expression to use 40.0 directly in place of max_accel to avoid any type inference ambiguity

problems.diagnostic: /CaseProject/modified_model.aadl | line 18: left and right sides of binary expression '>=' are of type 'real' and 'int', but must be of the same type
problems.cause: Same as above: integer literals 0 in (Actual_Speed.val - pre(Actual_Speed.val) >= 0) are interpreted as int, conflicting with real-typed speed difference
problems.minimal_edit: change '>= 0' to '>= 0.0' and '< 0' to '< 0.0' in the acceleration limit guarantee

problems.cause: THROT.Actual (from subcomponent) is not visible in component type contract; AGREE annex on Car type cannot reference subcomponent ports
problems.minimal_edit: remove the entire guarantee 'acceleration limit' from the Car type annex because it references subcomponent internals; move it to Car.Car_Impl implementation annex

problems.diagnostic: /CaseProject/modified_model.aadl | line 34: The types of 'Target_Speed' and 'Target' do not match.
problems.cause: Target_Speed is Types::speed.speed_impl but CNTRL.Target is incompatible; this is a connection-level type mismatch, not an AGREE contract issue
problems.minimal_edit: do not edit AGREE annex; this is an AADL connection error outside AGREE scope

problems.cause: SM.State_Out is not compatible with State_Signal; this is an AADL connection error, not an AGREE contract issue
problems.minimal_edit: do not edit AGREE annex; this is an AADL connection error outside AGREE scope

executor_steps: Move the guarantee 'acceleration limit' from the Car type annex to the Car.Car_Impl implementation annex

In the Car type annex, rewrite the acceleration limit guarantee to use 0.0 and 40.0 literals directly instead of max_accel to avoid type mismatch, but since it references subcomponent internals, remove it entirely from component type

In Car.Car_Impl implementation annex, add a new annex agree block containing: const max_accel : real = 40.0; guarantee "acceleration limit": initialized => (Actual_Speed.val - pre(Actual_Speed.val) >= 0.0) => (Actual_Speed.val - pre(Actual_Speed.val) < max_accel) and (Actual_Speed.val - pre(Actual_Speed.val) < 0.0) => (pre(Actual_Speed.val) - Actual_Speed.val < max_accel);

In Car type annex, change the constant declaration 'const max_accel : real = 40.0;' to be removed (since it's now in implementation) and rewrite the assume statement to use 40.0 only if needed — but it isn't; leave assume as-is
Remove the 'const max_accel : real = 40.0;' line from the Car type annex because it's now in implementation and should not appear in component type contract for implementation-specific constants
